_comment: Side feed for my own plugins. Same shape as upstream applicationFeed.json — U-Manager concatenates this onto the CA feed at fetch time.

applist.Name: UManager
applist.Author: jandrop
applist.Overview: Push notification agent for the U-Manager mobile app. Forwards Unraid Dynamix notifications (parity check, UPS events, Docker updates, etc.) over HTTPS to a Cloudflare Worker, which relays them to FCM and onto your device. Pair the Unraid server with the mobile app via the in-app QR scanner.

applist.Name: U-Manager Companion
applist.Author: jandrop
applist.Overview: Monkey-patches Unraid's bundled GraphQL API at boot to expose extra data the U-Manager mobile app needs — installed-plugin manifest metadata, network device utilisation, Docker stats, parity-check resume, power mutations and more. Required on the Unraid server for the app to show the full picture.
